text_source: Argh! My dreams ain't dyin' here!\n
Boys, we fall back and regroup!
EXI_B0535_B
*Cough, cough, cough*... Gah, my eyes!\n
Forgot about all the damn smoke!
How the hell did you forget...?
Shit, this ain't good...
Got no choice... Time to make a run for it!
EXI_B0535_A
*Cough, cough, cough*...\n
Forgot the... the damn... smoke again...\n
*cough, cough*...
At this point, it's... actually kind of impressive.
{c5}Combat Tutorial{c-1} added to the Glossary.
Man... What's with all these steps...?
Food pyramid.
You must ascend the steps to escape your fate\n
of being a total loser, dearest master...
Ugh... That word stings more than anything...
Glorious victory.
Now, dearest master, at last you can consider\n
yourself a non-loser.
It makes me feel like... I should just work normally,\n
by the sweat of my brow...
M-Maybe... I'm just going to be a loser no matter\n
what I accomplish...
